title: Taproot Control Blocks
description: A Taproot control block is script-path witness data containing the internal key, output-key parity, and Merkle proof needed to verify that a revealed tapscript leaf was committed to the spent output.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Canonical control-block encoding and script-path validation rules.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Schnorr/Taproot Workshop
resources.notes: Workshop context for the script-path witness and Taproot tree verification.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for Taproot outputs and witness construction.
